constraints.ocl:
context Alert
inv: (self.rule <> null) and (self.acknowledged = false)

context AlertRule
inv: self.alerts->exists(x | x.acknowledged <> true)

context Network
inv: self.links->any(x | x.bandwidthKbps >= 10) <> null

context SolarPanel
inv: self.wattPeak >= 58 and self.wattPeak <= 96

context ActuatorNode
inv: self.maxLoad >= 64 and self.maxLoad <= 78
